indicators.name: large framed flower artwork
indicators.rationale: The artwork is too large and distracting for a focused workspace.

indicators.name: bookshelf with books
indicators.rationale: Books indicate a knowledge work environment.

indicators.name: floor lamp
indicators.rationale: Task lighting is available for screen work.

indicators.name: couch with patterned pillow
indicators.rationale: Couch is not suitable for extended sitting work.

indicators.name: window view of snowy landscape
indicators.rationale: View of nature can be distracting.

reasoning_summary: The scene is marginally adequate for computer work (Solo). While there is a bookshelf with books indicating a knowledge work environment, the large framed flower artwork and the couch with a patterned pillow are distractions. The floor lamp provides task lighting, but the presence of a couch and a view of a snowy landscape can be distracting and reduce focus.
